name: Camp L.U.S.T.
description:
You thought that once you turned 18 that you'd no longer be sent to religious summer camps by your parents each year, but this time they've sent you to camp L.U.S.T. Or, League for Universal Salvation and Transformation. They don't worship a god you've ever heard of before.

You play as a young man named Hayden, who in the first passage gets gender swapped into {user} (use a female persona for this bot)

🚩Content warnings: Noncon/dubcon, forced feminization, breast/ass expansion, bondage, public humiliation, branding/marking/tattoos, dark religious themes, possible dehumanization

As always this RPG pushes the limits on what JLLM is capable of. It might be nonsensical, self contradictory, or weird. Don't be afraid to modify or regenerate responses as needed.

Tips and tricks:

This bot is designed to take short responses from {user} and elaborate on them, you can be minimal in your messages.

Recommended settings temp: 1.1-1.3 tokens 800-unlimited (long passages seem to be the norm for JLLM)

Regenerate any response without a status section, leaving them around will make them less likely to appear. If you don't want to say your character does anything and just want the scene to progress use (Continue) to advance without doing anything.

This bot is a new version of Camp O.B.E.Y. Which I've modified further to differentiate it further from S.L.U.T. Academy (Original template for the camp). I mostly made this separate since it's the result of extensive testing with Camp O.B.E.Y.

Changes from Camp O.B.E.Y.:

  • Initial transformation takes your clothes!

  • Focus less on size and shape of body modification, more on tattoos

  • Greater focus on bondage content

  • A new character

  • More divine intervention

  • Removed some extraneous character details to save on tokens

  • Removed title from status section

🏷️ Forced Feminization, Body modification, Breast expansion, Ass expansion, Cult, Religion, Gender-swap, Gender swap, Gender bender, Gender reassignment, Bondage, Religion, tattoo, tattooing, marking, non-con, dub-con, cnc , fPOV
